title: thymus longiflorus subsp. funkii
intro: Thymus longiflorus subsp. funkii is a subspecies of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae, commonly known as a type of thyme. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Thymus longiflorus subsp. funkii include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and improve digestion. Thymus longiflorus subsp. funkii can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile herbal remedy.
